title: US allows Anthropic to release Mythos to 'trusted partners'
abstract: US allows Anthropic to release Mythos to 'trusted partners' may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform ...
abstract_zh: 美国终于点头了，Anthropic可以悄悄把神话级AI（Mythos）递给它那些“值得信赖”的小伙伴了！这可是个超级小众但精准高效的宝贝，就像给程序员们递了个私人定制的神器。在瞬息万变的AI江湖里，这招真是稳准狠啊！
